message:
fix: add TOCTOU guard to detectZombieLiveSession restart paths (gt-0pst)

Re-check session liveness before each RestartPolecatSession call in
detectZombieLiveSession. Between the initial sessionAlive check and
the restart, the session could exit normally — restarting it with
--force would create an unwanted new session. The dead-session path
already had this guard (sessionRecreated); the live-session path did not.
